description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/ercom/docker:17.11.0-ce-git for the build job, runs in the build stage, and only triggers on tag pushes. The job should set DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay and DOCKER_HOST to tcp://docker:2375, use a docker:17.11.0-ce-dind service aliased as docker, and execute the commands: docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_TAG . and, if CI_BUILD_TOKEN is present, docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY followed by docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_TAG. No caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are defined.
